items.caption: A black and white illustration with a school bus at the top. below the bus, there is a rhyming poem titled "the school bus rhyme." the poem is divided into two columns with the left column listing actions a school bus driver might perform, such as driving around town, picking up and dropping off, and bouncing up and down. the right column provides instructions for children on how to board the bus, including turning to the left, turning to the right, and taking the front seat. at the bottom of the image, there is a note encouraging children to hop up and take the front seat, and a call to the child at the end of the line to move to the front of the line. the style of the image is educational and child-friendly, with a focus on safety instructions.
